$comment: Copy to ~/.pi/agent/fallback-providers.json (user) or .pi/fallback-providers.json (project). Project config overrides user config for matching provider keys; project fallbacks list replaces user's entirely.

strip.$comment: Unregister when ANY env is set (ambient cloud creds shadow real providers). Omit 'strip' entirely to use this default set; set to [] to disable.

failover.$comment: Consecutive errored turns (stopReason=error, after pi's own retries) before switching to the next fallback whose contextWindow fits. Omit for default 3.
